data.title: Add prior-art search framework reference to fix-bug, review-fix-dispatch, and task-execution
data.description:
GREEN: Add prior-art-search.md reference to 3 consuming skills. Remove RED marker from .test-index.

Changes:
1. plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md: Add reference before Step 6 (code modification gate). Before dispatching fix, agent must consult the shared prior-art search framework at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/prior-art-search.md. Insert between Step 5.5 (RED-before-fix gate) and Step 6.
2. plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/review-fix-dispatch.md: Add prior-art search instruction in the resolution sub-agent prompt. Before implementing a fix for review findings, check if prior art exists.
3. plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md: Add prior-art search instruction. Before implementing, consult the framework.
4. .test-index: Remove RED marker for this test.

Note: Eval coverage (behavioral verification that agents actually consult the framework) is tracked by Story 3 (85df-1d42), explicitly out of scope per story description.

File Impact:
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md (edit)
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/review-fix-dispatch.md (edit)
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md (edit)
- .test-index (edit — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All consumer reference tests pass (GREEN) - Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-consumers.sh
- [ ] Test gate exits 0 - Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] fix-bug references prior-art-search in Step 6 section - Verify: awk '/Step 6/{found=1} found && /Step 7/{exit} found && /prior-art-search/{print}' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md | grep -q prior-art-search
- [ ] review-fix-dispatch references prior-art-search - Verify: grep -q prior-art-search plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/review-fix-dispatch.md
- [ ] task-execution references prior-art-search - Verify: grep -q prior-art-search plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- [ ] RED marker removed - Verify: ! grep -q 'test-prior-art-search-consumers.*\[test_fix_bug_references_prior_art\]' .test-index
